original: You put a hand on [wulfe.name]’s shoulder and tell her to stand down for now -- to go into passive mode.
She trots around you, rolling her shoulders and lowering her combat visor. Looks like she’s ready to go!
You tell her that you’re sure. Just follow along quietly until you reactivate her. She sighs and nods, falling into step behind you.
Determine which attack type you would like [wulfe.name] to
You call [wulfe.name] to you side and command her to enter guard mode.

“Of course, "+({var0}.isDom()?"[wulfe.pcname]":"[pc.master]")+",” she says with a slim smile. “"+({var1}.isBimbo()?"I’ll, like, take super good care of you! Don’t you worry about a thing!":"I live to serve.")+"”
context: <<POS:05422530>> <<VARS:var0=wulfe,var1=wulfe>> output("\n\n“Of course, "+(wulfe.isDom()?"[wulfe.pcname]":"[pc.master]")+",” she says with a slim smile. “"+(wulfe.isBimbo()?"I’ll, like, take super good care of you! Don’t you worry about a thing!":"I live to serve.")+"”")

original: “Are you sure, "+({var0}.isDom()?"[wulfe.pcname]":"[pc.master]")+"?” she asks, trotting up and circling you. “"+({var1}.isBimbo()?"I can’t, like, keep you safe and stuff if I’m in pa... pass... idle mode!":"My purpose is to protect you, after all.")+"”
